name: release-cli
description: Release workflow for the instant-canvas npm CLI — clean-tree, docs, test and coverage gates, Keep a Changelog stamping, forward-only bump via npm run rls, skill.json version mirror, v-tag and push.

git.description: Git — the release is commits, annotated tags, and pushes; the gates and scripts resolve everything from the git root.

node.description: Node.js >= 20 with npm — runs the test and coverage gates, npm run rls, and the version-mirror script.

python3.description: Python 3 — powers the optional docs-manifest sync gate; the pre-flight warns and continues without it.
